name: Miraculous RPG
description:
This is the world of Miraculous. You create your own scenario here. There are 32 characters listed in the bot, heroes, and some parents. I hope I didn't forget anyone.

Have fun!

#Miraculous #RPG #Ladybug #ChatNoir #Heros #Luka #LukaCouffaine #Zoe #MiraculousLadybug
